title: 30 Claude Features You Need to Know NOW (Become a PRO!)
summary: A YouTube tutorial from AI Master covers 30 practical techniques for using Claude more effectively, including prompting strategies, multi-agent workflows, connectors, code generation, and automation features. The video aims to show users how to move beyond basic question-answer interactions and access advanced capabilities like artifacts, projects, and agent-level functionality.
